title: Glowing Trim Weapon & Tools
description:
Now weapon and tools has 18 trims and 13+3 colors . Sword ,trident, spear, mace and tools
just rename it
Optifine  required
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
✨ Glowing Trim Weapon & Tools Pack

Hello everyone! 👋
Back again with a brand new pack for Minecraft!

Introducing the Glowing Trim Weapon & Tools Pack — a stylish texture pack that adds glowing trim designs to your weapons and tools, giving them a unique, vibrant look.

Whether you play with shaders or not, this pack works smoothly and enhances your gameplay with eye-catching visuals.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔥 Features
✨ Glowing (Emissive) Trim Effects
🎨 13 Base Colors + 3 Netherite-Exclusive Colors
🛡️ 18 Unique Trim Designs
⚔️ Supports Weapons & Tools
🔧 Easy activation via item renaming
💡 Works with or without shaders

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

📌 Important Information
✔ OptiFine is required
✔ Uses Custom Item Textures (CIT) via renaming
✔ Effects apply only to weapons & tools
✔ Simply rename items to activate designs

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚔️ Supported Items

Weapons:

Mace, Trident, Spear
Bow, Crossbow
Sword (Iron, Copper, Gold, Diamond, Netherite)

Tools:

Hoe, Shovel, Pickaxe, Axe (Iron → Netherite)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎨 Color System
🌈 Base Colors (13)

| Color Name        | Code |
| ----------------- | ---- |
| Amethyst          | a    |
| Copper            | c    |
| Cherry            | ch   |
| Diamond           | d    |
| Emerald           | e    |
| Gold              | g    |
| Iron              | i    |
| Lapis             | l    |
| Netherite         | n    |
| Quartz            | q    |
| Redstone          | r    |
| Resin             | rs   |
| Prismarine        | p    |

🔥 Netherite Exclusive (+3)

| Gilded Blackstone | gb   |
| Magma             | m    |
| Sculk             | s    |

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🛡️Trim Designs

| Design    | Code |
| --------- | ---- |
| Bolt      | 1    |
| Coast     | 2    |
| Dune      | 3    |
| Eye       | 4    |
| Flow      | 5    |
| Host      | 6    |
| Raiser    | 7    |
| Rib       | 8    |
| Sentry    | 9    |
| Shaper    | 10   |
| Silence   | 11   |
| Snout     | 12   |
| Spire     | 13   |
| Tide      | 14   |
| Vex       | 15   |
| Ward      | 16   |
| Wayfinder | 17   |
| Wild      | 18   |

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚙️ How to Use

Rename your item using:
[Color Code] + [Design Code]

Examples:
r14 , a10 , l6 , g7 , c4 , d16 , l2 , n9 , i3 , q12, ch18 , rs17, p15.

🔥 Netherite Only
 Examples:
m5, gb6, s10

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

📌 Fixed Design Items

(Trident, Bow, Crossbow, Tools)
Use color code only:
Examples:
r , a , l , g , c , d , l , n , i , q , ch , rs, p.

🔥 Netherite Only
 Examples: 
m , gb , s

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

✨ Changes Applied

-After applying the pack:

1]Spear models (1.21.11+)
2]Mace models (1.21+)
2]Trident, Bow, Crossbow
3]All Swords (Iron → Netherite)
4]All Tools (Iron → Netherite)
5]🆕 Copper weapons (1.21.9+)
6]GUI elements

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚠️ OptiFine Settings Required

Make sure these options are enabled:
✔ Emissive Textures
✔ Custom Items

Otherwise, the pack may not work properly.
Without OptiFine, the glowing (emissive) effect may not work, or the entire pack may fail.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🔧 Alternative Mods

Fabric Mods-
EMF (Entity Model Features)
ETF (Entity Texture Features)
Continuity
CIT Resewn
Indium

Forge Mods-
EMF (Entity Model Features)
ETF (Entity Texture Features)
Connectedness
Fusion (Connected Textures)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

❗ Troubleshooting

🔄 Reload resource packs if it stops working
⚙️ Check OptiFine version compatibility
📦 Ensure proper installation

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🌍 Compatibility
✔ Singleplayer & Multiplayer
✔ Versions: 1.16 → Latest
✔ Separate files per version

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎉 Final Note

Upgrade your gear with glowing trims and stand out in your world.

Thanks for downloading ❤️.
